untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of alternating bid/ask jumps (3+ consecutive), price distance from midpoint in spread units (1.5× average spread), and tracking consecutive bounce direction reversals. These microstructure-level conditions (bid/ask alternation pattern, dynamic spread measurement, transitory spread components) cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-derived indicators. The allowed indicator set lacks order flow direction tracking, bid/ask level data, and spread-aware price deviation metrics.
translation_notes: Partially translated using vol_ratio_20 as a proxy for impatient order flow (below 40th percentile indicates lower-than-median volume on moves). Exit conditions use pivot point as approximation of midpoint reversion target. True implementation requires tick-level bid/ask data and order flow classification unavailable in standard OHLCV indicators.
